notes: This file is owned by Agent 05 only.

sprint_meta.notes: WK44 Stage 2: dynamic tree growth sim components (Tree + NatureSystem + unit tests). Integration owned by Agent 03.

scope_guardrails_followed: Did not edit: game/sim_engine.py, game/sim/snapshot.py, game/world.py, or any game/graphics files (Agent 03 owns integration).
what_i_changed: game/entities/nature.py (new): Tree dataclass with grid_x/grid_y, growth_percentage (default 0.25), growth_ms_accum and stable (tx,ty) key.
game/systems/nature.py (new): NatureSystem.tick(dt, trees) advances growth deterministically in discrete steps 0.25->0.5->0.75->1.0, with 2 minutes per transition (~6 minutes total).
tests/test_nature_growth.py (new): verifies growth hits 0.25/0.5/0.75/1.0 at 0/2/4/6 minutes.

sprint_meta.notes: WK45 Stage 2.5: sapling spawning logic in NatureSystem + tests (no integration files touched; Agent 03 owns wiring + removal-on-build).

scope_guardrails_followed: Did not edit: game/sim_engine.py, game/world.py, or any game/graphics files (Agent 03 owns integration + removal-on-build).
what_i_changed: game/systems/nature.py: added deterministic sapling spawning (1 per 30s global cadence) with cap=50; prefers near existing trees; falls back to any valid GRASS+buildable tile; marks world tile to TileType.TREE on spawn; added helper remove_trees_in_footprint for integration.
tests/test_nature_spawns_saplings.py (new): verifies cadence, tile marking, and cap enforcement.

sprint_meta.notes: WK46 Stage 3: BuilderPeasant gathers local wood (per-peasant) before building; integration of sim helpers + log stack visuals owned by Agent 03.

scope_guardrails_followed: Did not edit: game/sim_engine.py, game/sim/snapshot.py, game/world.py, or any game/graphics files (Agent 03 owns integration + renderer).
what_i_changed: config.py: added Stage 3 constants (BUILDER_CHOP_DURATION_S, BUILDER_HARVEST_DURATION_S, BUILDER_WOOD_COST_* and BUILDER_MIN_CHOP_GROWTH).

game/entities/builder_peasant.py: added wood-gathering phases (FIND_TREE/MOVE_TO_TREE/CHOPPING/HARVESTING/WAIT_ON_PLOT_NO_TREES) and per-peasant wood_inventory; prefers calling game_state['sim'] helpers (find_nearest_choppable_tree_for_builder / chop_tree_at / harvest_log_at) when present.
tests/test_wood_yield_by_growth.py: unit test for yield thresholds (1.0/0.75/0.50).
tests/test_builder_lumberjack_house.py: proves builder does not build until wood >= 10, then completes construction.
tests/test_builder_lumberjack_farm.py: proves farm requires multiple harvests to reach wood >= 20 before building.
tests/test_builder_lifecycle.py: updated harness to include minimal world + a tree so Stage 3 builder can complete.

pytest.command: python -m pytest -q tests/test_builder_lumberjack_house.py tests/test_builder_lumberjack_farm.py tests/test_wood_yield_by_growth.py tests/test_builder_lifecycle.py

coordination_notes_for_agent_03: BuilderPeasant expects integration helpers on sim exposed via game_state['sim']: find_nearest_choppable_tree_for_builder(from_tx,from_ty)->(tx,ty,growth)|None; chop_tree_at(tx,ty)->growth; harvest_log_at(tx,ty)->wood_amount.
HARVESTING phase no longer checks for TileType.TREE (tree should be removed on chop); it trusts harvest_log_at at completion time.

what_i_changed: game/systems/neutral_buildings.py: if any pending builder-only plots exist and there is no active BuilderPeasant, auto-spawn a replacement BuilderPeasant from the castle targeting the oldest pending plot; still blocks spawning new plots while one is pending.

game/entities/builder_peasant.py: if target plot has construction_started=True, skip wood gathering and resume BUILDING immediately (prevents double-paying wood when replacement builder is spawned mid-build).
tests/test_builder_lifecycle.py: added regression test test_builder_replaced_if_dies_mid_construction_and_plot_unblocks (builder dies mid-build -> replacement spawns -> plot completes).
game/systems/neutral_buildings.py: throughput tweak — allow up to 3 concurrent pending builder-only plots and up to 3 BuilderPeasants active at once (prevents slow ramp when hero count is high).
tests/test_builder_lifecycle.py: added test_neutral_buildings_allow_up_to_three_concurrent_plots_and_builders.

game/systems/neutral_buildings.py: queue mixing policy — with 3 slots and demand for multiple types, ensure houses + food can start without waiting for all houses; introduce first farm once, then strict priority for new slots: house > food_stand > farm.
tests/test_builder_lifecycle.py: added test_neutral_buildings_mix_types_before_stacking_houses and test_neutral_buildings_respects_priority_after_one_of_each.
how_to_test: python -m pytest -q tests/test_builder_lifecycle.py tests/test_builder_lumberjack_house.py tests/test_builder_lumberjack_farm.py tests/test_wood_yield_by_growth.py

pytest.command: python -m pytest -q tests/test_builder_lifecycle.py tests/test_builder_lumberjack_house.py tests/test_builder_lumberjack_farm.py tests/test_wood_yield_by_growth.py

what_i_changed: game/sim_engine.py: peasant respawn logic now counts only regular Peasants (non-BuilderPeasant) toward the baseline 'keep 2 alive' workforce; prevents BuilderPeasants from suppressing respawns needed to finish player-placed buildings.
tests/test_peasant_respawn_does_not_count_builder.py (new): regression test ensuring regular peasant respawn occurs even when BuilderPeasants are alive.

sprint_meta.notes: WK49 Wave 2 Agent 05: sim-owned hero identity, bounded memory, known places, career counters.

wk49_r3_identity_memory.what_i_changed: Hero: non-empty hero_id (keyword hero_id= or monotonic h######## fallback), optional name= for tests; profile_memory (HeroMemoryEntry list, cap via hero_memory.PROFILE_MEMORY_MAX_ENTRIES), known_places dict with remember_known_place upsert/dedupe and trim by oldest first_seen; profile_career dict; increment_career_stat; record_profile_memory; hooks: add_gold -> gold_earned, buy_item -> purchases_made, on_attack_landed killed enemy -> enemies_defeated. game/systems/hero_memory.py: caps + stable_place_id. game/systems/bounty.py: bounties_claimed on claim. Tests: tests/test_hero_identity.py, tests/test_hero_memory.py.
follow_ups: tiles_revealed: engine fog/reveal path still mutates _revealed_tiles directly; career counter needs Agent 03 discovery hook.
Gold grants that bypass Hero.add_gold do not increment gold_earned until broader economy attribution migrates to hero_id-aware helpers.

wk49_r8_bugfix_known_places_ranger_xp.what_i_changed: Root cause: ranger FoW tile XP used hero.xp += 1 in game/sim_engine.py, bypassing Hero.add_xp level-up loop so xp could stay >= xp_to_level. Added Hero.grant_tile_exploration_xp (delegates to add_xp) and wired fog reveal path to call it. New tests: tests/test_hero_progression_invariant.py (many small grants, burst vs add_xp parity, profile snapshot invariant).

sprint_meta.notes: WK50 Wave 0: gameplay safety consult for direct prompt refusal/redirect (Agent 05).

wk50_r1_design_guardrails.what_i_changed: Consult-only — HP/potion/rest/target/shop guardrails for Phase 2B direct prompt validation and in-character refusal. No repo code edits. Policy: (A) Critical HP — current_hp/max_hp <= 0.25 (aligns with plan 25% critical): do not apply physical actions for explore_direction, discretionary go_to_known_place, or buy_potions unless already at shop interaction range with affordable potion; prefer seek_healing — use_potion if inventory count > 0, else retreat/move_to nearest resolvable known safety (home/castle, then inn/temple/healer if in known_places). LLM may return Defy with refusal_reason critical_health / unsafe_requested_action and redirect tool_action as above. (B) Low HP + low potions — hp/max_hp <= 0.50 AND potion_count <= 1: same veto bias for non-healing intents; buy_potions allowed only if gold covers at least one potion, known marketplace exists, and deterministic safety/range checks pass. (C) Unknown target — target_id not in hero known_places or natural language maps to zero or many IDs: no move/buy; force validator drop or map to no_action_chat_only; refusal_reason unknown_target; in-character ask to name a known place or offer status_report — never invent place IDs. (D) No gold / no shop — gold < cheapest potion price OR no known marketplace (profile): refuse buy_potions with refusal_reason no_gold or no_known_shop and spoken explanation; optional status_report. (E) Resting — rest_until_healed: if in combat or critical HP band, redirect to seek_healing first; if already in safe rest context (home/inn) and not threatened, allow rest/idle until healed; if HP already near full (>= plan RESTED_AND_READY band e.g. 95%), prefer no_action_chat_only with short reply. Thresholds stay consistent with Phase 2A LOW_HEALTH_COMBAT (50% consider, 25% critical) from the same sprint plan.

wk50_r13_peasant_void_walk_hotfix.what_i_changed: Fixed peasants abandoning active construction sites. Root cause: _pick_build_target sorted unconstructed sites with construction_started=False first, so as soon as a peasant called start_construction() on the player's building any other pending foundation sorted ahead—workers marched toward that distant site (often corner/map-origin read as 'void'). Fix in game/entities/peasant.py: _eligible_regular_build_candidate helper; _pick_build_target now (1) keeps sticky identity match to target_building when still an eligible scaffold, (2) otherwise prefers buildings where construction_already_started over fresh foundations (then placed_time_ms). Added tests/test_peasant_build_target.py regression tests.

sprint_meta.notes: WK53: Terrain elevation visual sprint. Agent 05 Wave 0 consult-only: gameplay implications advisory for future elevation gameplay systems.

wk53_r1_sky_fog_architecture.what_i_changed: Consult-only work. Created gameplay implications advisory doc at .cursor/plans/wk53_gameplay_elevation_advisory.md covering building placement on slopes, movement cost scaling, combat elevation advantages, resource economy impact, and heightmap API requirements for future sprite implementation.
wk53_r1_sky_fog_architecture.advisory_summary: Elevation is visual-only in WK53 but data model must support 4 gameplay systems later: (1) Building placement restrictions (slope ≤10°, Guardhouse ≤15°); (2) Movement costs (+20% per 10° uphill, cliffs ≥45° impassable); (3) Combat bonuses (+15% damage on high ground, +1 tile ranged range); (4) Economy tuning (farms on slopes > 5° get -10% gold penalty). Provided 7 API functions required for Agent 03 heightmap design: get_terrain_height, get_slope_at_point, get_slope_between_points, get_max_slope_at_footprint, is_cliff, get_elevation_tier, get_terrain_cost_multiplier. All features marked 'future sprint implementation' — no gameplay code touched WK53.
files_reviewed: config.py (building types, costs, sizes, enemy stats, hero stats)

evidence.advisory_doc: Written to .cursor/plans/wk53_gameplay_elevation_advisory.md with 5 sections (building placement, movement, combat, resources, API), config constants table, risks/mitigations, and 7 public API functions for heightmap system.

coordination_notes: Agent 03: Use the 7 API functions as contract for Wave 0 architecture doc. Heightmap must support slope queries, elevation tiers, and terrain cost multipliers.
Future implementation (Agent 05 in WK54+): Building placement gates, movement cost scaling, combat bonuses, economy penalties all depend on this API being complete and accurate.

sprint_meta.notes: WK57: Underground vertical stacking. Agent 05 owns Wave 4 (layer pathfinding + underground fog) and Wave 5 (hero transitions + spawning + AI cave exploration).

what_i_changed: game/systems/pathfinding.py: Added LayerPathfinder class wrapping existing find_path() with layer-aware routing. Handles 4 cases: surface-only, underground-only, surface-to-underground (via cave entrance), underground-to-surface. Underground A* uses 4-directional movement on area walkability grid with local/world coord conversion.

game/world.py: Added underground_visibility dict in World.__init__. Added init_underground_fog(area) to create per-area UNSEEN grids. Added reveal_underground_circle(area_id, local_x, local_z, radius) for circular fog reveal.
game/sim_engine.py: After underground area generation in setup_initial_state(), added fog grid initialization loop and LayerPathfinder instantiation (self.layer_pathfinder).

tests/test_underground.py (new): 13 tests covering UndergroundArea data model (chambers, walkability, heightmap, corridors), underground fog (init, reveal, bounds, unknown area), and LayerPathfinder (surface-only, start==goal, unknown goal, underground-only).
follow_ups: Wave 5 (Agent 05): hero descent/ascent state machine, cave entry via POI interaction, underground enemy spawning, AI cave exploration scoring.

what_i_changed: game/entities/hero.py: Added underground_area_id, underground_local_x, underground_local_z fields to Hero.__init__. Added begin_descent(area_id, entrance_x, entrance_y) and begin_ascent() transition methods.

game/systems/poi_interaction.py: Added _underground_areas and _sim_engine references to POIInteractionSystem.__init__. Replaced _handle_dungeon from flavor-text-only to full cave entry: triggers hero.begin_descent(), marks entrance chamber explored, reveals underground fog, spawns underground enemies. Added module-level _spawn_underground_enemies() function that instantiates enemies from chamber data at layer=-1.

game/sim_engine.py: Wired underground_areas and sim self-reference to poi_interaction_system after setup. Added WK57 Wave 5E retreat check in update loop: calls check_underground_hero_retreat for underground heroes each tick.
game/underground.py: Added check_underground_hero_retreat(hero, underground_areas) function that triggers begin_ascent() when hero HP < 30% max or all chambers cleared.

ai/behaviors/poi_awareness.py: Added dungeon_factor to score_poi_for_personality(): aggressive/brave heroes get 1.5x, cautious heroes get 0.2x (low level) or 0.8x, low HP heroes (<70%) get 0.1x multiplier. Updated maybe_visit_poi() to target entrance tile directly for dungeon POIs.

tests/test_underground.py: Extended from 13 to 25 tests. Added TestHeroTransitions (5 tests: descent/ascent layer, local coords, field existence), TestHeroRetreat (5 tests: low HP, healthy, all cleared, surface no-op, missing area), TestDungeonScoring (2 tests: aggressive bonus, low HP avoidance).
